zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Fitzhugh Greasley於1238年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾格亞斯利時，她的父親Lord Hugh FitzRalph43歲，母親Agnes de Gresley43歲。她於1259年與Simon de Driby在英國波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1277年在英國林可爾史爾德利比享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Fitzhugh Greasley于1238年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾格亞斯利时，她的父亲Lord Hugh FitzRalph43岁，母亲Agnes de Gresley43岁。她于1259年与Simon de Driby在英国波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1277年在英国林可爾史爾德利比享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greasley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

variants.name: Gridley
meanings: variant of Greasley, either a habitational name from Greasley in Nottinghamshire (but possibly also from Gresley in Derbyshire), or a nickname either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’.

perhaps from Middle English greithli, gritheli ‘good, pleasant, noble’ (Old Norse greithligr), the source of modern northern dialect gradely ‘decent, honest, good-looking, kind’. In the absence of medieval surname forms this is conjectural.
English:

variants.name: Graley
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Greasley, a habitational name from any of the places so called in Nottinghamshire or Derbyshire, or a nickname either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’.
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Greulich  .
Irish: variant of Greally, from Mag Raoghallaigh ‘son of Raoghallach’, a variant of Raghailleach; compare O'Reilly .

variants.name: Grealey
meanings: 1 Irish: from Mag Raoghallaigh, see Greally .
2  English:  see  Greasley   and   Graley  .

variants.name: Gresly
meanings: English:  see  Greasley  .

variants.name: Grisley
meanings: English:  see  Greasley  .

variants.name: Le Gresley
meanings: Norman: nickname, either from Old French le greslet ‘the one marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French le greslet, le gresli ‘the thin or slim (one)’. Compare English Greasley (2).

variants.name: Gresley
meanings: English:  see  Greasley  .

variants.name: Grayley
meanings: 1 Irish: from Mag Raoghallaigh, see Greally .
2  English:  see  Greasley   and   Graley  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

variants.name: Alys
meanings: Variant spelling of   Alice .

variants.name: Alis
meanings: equivalent of Alice .

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Fitzhugh Greasley was born in 1238, in Greasley, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Lord Hugh FitzRalph, was 43 and her mother, Agnes de Gresley, was 43. She married Simon de Driby in 1259, in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1277, in Driby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Fitzhugh Greasley est née en 1238, à Greasley, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Hugh FitzRalph, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Gresley, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Simon de Driby en 1259, à Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1277, à Driby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

Sie hat 1259 in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England Simon de Driby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1277 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Driby, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Fitzhugh Greasleyが1238年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアグレアスリーで生まれた時，父Lord Hugh FitzRalphは43歳，母Agnes de Gresleyは43歳であった。1259年にイギリスバークシュアイアストラトフィールド モーティマーでSimon de Dribyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1277年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアドリビーで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Fitzhugh Greasley(이)가 1238년 영국 노틴그함실르 그리슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hugh FitzRalph(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Gresley(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1259년 영국 버크실르 스트라트필드 모르팀어에서 Simon de Driby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 영국 링코실르 드리비에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Simon de Driby em 1259, em Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Fitzhugh Greasley родилась в 1238 г. в местности грисли, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord Hugh FitzRalph было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Gresley, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon de Driby в 1259 г. в местности стратфиелд мортимир, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1277 г. в местности дриби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.
